name: punch-action-timing
description: Sample wind-up, contact, recovery, full-body motion, contact timing, and the fixed one-second action cooldown at a focus-independent 30 Hz cadence.

args.code: local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local r=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart r.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-200)) r.AssemblyLinearVelocity=Vector3.zero return true

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local a=g.PunchWallClientAutomation local phases={} local joint for _,d in ipairs(p.Character:GetDescendants()) do if (d:IsA('Motor6D') or d:IsA('AnimationConstraint')) and (d.Name=='RightShoulder' or d.Name=='Right Shoulder') then joint=d break end end assert(joint,'right shoulder missing') local first=a:Invoke('Punch') local actionAt=g:GetAttribute('LastPunchActionAt') or 0 local contactAt=g:GetAttribute('PunchContactAt') or 0 local second=a:Invoke('Punch') local blocked=g:GetAttribute('PunchActionCooldownBlocked') local maxAngle,maxOffset=0,0 for i=1,50 do task.wait(1/30) local phase=g:GetAttribute('PunchMotionPhase') phases[phase or 'nil']=true local x,y,z=joint.Transform:ToOrientation() maxAngle=math.max(maxAngle,math.abs(x),math.abs(y),math.abs(z)) maxOffset=math.max(maxOffset,joint.Transform.Position.Magnitude) end local recovered=not g:GetAttribute('CharacterPunchMotionActive') and g:GetAttribute('PunchMotionPhase')=='Idle' while os.clock()-actionAt<1.02 do task.wait(.01) end local third=a:Invoke('Punch') task.wait(.78) return H:JSONEncode({first=first,second=second,blocked=blocked,third=third,windup=phases.Windup==true,contact=phases.Contact==true,recovery=phases.Recovery==true,contactDelay=contactAt-actionAt,interval=g:GetAttribute('PunchAttackInterval'),duration=g:GetAttribute('PunchAnimationDuration'),maxAngle=maxAngle,maxOffset=maxOffset,recovered=recovered,active=g:GetAttribute('CharacterPunchMotionActive'),valid=first and not second and blocked and third and phases.Windup and phases.Contact and phases.Recovery and recovered and math.abs((contactAt-actionAt)-.2)<.025 and maxAngle>.7 and maxOffset>.2})

steps.label: punch phases and cooldown are synchronized
